name: RBE With Reset
Clock Toolbar
format:
<script id="titleScript" type="text/javascript">

$(function() {
    if($('.md-toolbar-tools').length != 0){
        loadClock();
    }else setTimeout(loadClock, 500)
});

function loadClock(){
    $('#clock').remove();
    var toolbar = $('.md-toolbar-tools');
    
    var div = $('<div/>');
    var p = $('<p/ id="clock">');
    
    div.append(p);
    div[0].style.margin = '5px 5px 5px auto';
    toolbar.append(div);

    function displayTitle(lh) {
        p.text(lh); 
    }
    
    function upTime() {
        var d = new Date();
        p.text(d.toUTCString());
    }

    if(document.clockInterval){ 
            clearInterval(document.clockInterval);
            document.clockInterval = null;
    }
        
    document.clockInterval = setInterval(upTime,1000);
}

</script>

info:
The msg.payload is set to open or closed and
sent to MQTT so that the Steppir controller
will know to open or close the gate.

When Closed, the Steppir code will not send commands
to the controller and hopefully not cause the 
Steppir to actually move while in TX

name: Please read!!  Set Ping node IP address to radio IP
info:
This interrogates the broadcasts from the radio and parses info such as model, radio name, client IP, and client name  (it will show multiple clients if multiple clients are connected). This flow also sets the proper meter numbers based upon model of radio and software version.

Change the Pin node IP address of your Flex Radio. This determines when the radio is on or off.

Dave wo2x

name: Notes
info:
**Subscribe** - remeber to subscribe to what status you want from the radio
**Bind** - If you do not use the bind command, 
then you will noty get all GUI updates.  
For example, rfpower will only update on trasnmit, 
but if you bind and change the rf power then the new value 
does come into node red
